title: Manufacturing Engineer - EPC Industrie - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - EPC Industrie - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
EPC Industrie has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About EPC Industrie:
EPC Industrie is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie!
